name: Clean Minimalist
color_strategy: monochromatic or max 2 colors; heavy use of neutral white space
typography_role: small weight differences; rely on size hierarchy not weight

name: Flat Design
color_strategy: solid color blocks; no gradients or shadows; bold flat palette
typography_role: medium weight geometric sans-serif paired with iconography

name: Swiss/International
color_strategy: monochromatic with single functional accent; strict grid contrast
typography_role: Helvetica or grotesque sans on a strict modular grid; asymmetric hierarchy

name: Scandinavian
color_strategy: muted earthy palette; warm wood tones over white
typography_role: thin light weight humanist sans; quiet hierarchy

name: Zen Minimal
color_strategy: calm beige and off-white base; single muted natural accent
typography_role: thin light weight serif; large breathing-room hierarchy

name: Corporate Blue
color_strategy: navy and blue palette signalling trust; white backgrounds; conservative accent
typography_role: Inter or Source Sans with moderate weights; clear structured hierarchy

name: Enterprise SaaS
color_strategy: neutral grays with single utility accent; minimal chrome
typography_role: small regular sans with sidebar density; tabular alignment

name: Professional Services
color_strategy: dark conservative palette with restrained accent; authoritative contrast
typography_role: elegant serif for headings; clean sans for body; quiet authority

name: Government/Civic

typography_role: bold high-legibility sans; structured formal hierarchy

typography_role: clean medium weight sans; clear legible hierarchy
